summary: This indicator directly measures how many Queens Public Library branches kept expanded, six-day-a-week schedules, which QPL restored progressively as pandemic-era staffing and hour reductions were lifted between Fiscal 2022 and Fiscal 2024. The Fiscal 2026 dip shown here is a partial-year figure — QPL's own preliminary Fiscal 2026 report shows six-day service running at 90 percent through the first four months of the year, close to Fiscal 2025's full-year level of 92 percent, suggesting little real change rather than a sharp drop.

sources.label: NYC Public Libraries, Fiscal 2025 Mayor's Management Report
NYC Public Libraries, Fiscal 2026 Preliminary Mayor's Management Report

oneLiner: increasing as pandemic-era hours were restored; FY26 dip is partial-year data
